command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup && git pull origin main

echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/roadmap_gen.py
python3 /tmp/roadmap_gen.py

git add docs/phase-9e-extended-roadmap.md docs/single-shared-reality-architecture.md
git status --short | head -5

git commit -m "Phase 9E Extended Roadmap — 10 phases, 3 governing principles, 2 open design problems"
git tag Phase9E-ExtendedRoadmap

git push origin main && git push origin Phase9E-ExtendedRoadmap
git push github main && git push github Phase9E-ExtendedRoadmap

echo "=== VERIFY ==="
wc -l docs/phase-9e-extended-roadmap.md
git log --oneline -3
git tag -l | tail -5
